name: studiojuai-marketing-platform
description: AI 마케팅 자동화 플랫폼 - 30개 AI 봇 시스템 (Full Backend)

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply studiojuai-db --config wrangler-worker.toml
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply studiojuai-db --local --config wrangler-worker.toml
scripts.secret:naver: wrangler secret put NAVER_CLIENT_ID --config wrangler-worker.toml && wrangler secret put NAVER_CLIENT_SECRET --config wrangler-worker.toml

author: Studiojuai
